title: Graph Contains Undirected Cycle
hints: Consider traversing the graph. What happens if you encounter a vertex you have already visited during the current traversal path?
Use Depth First Search to explore connected components. Track which vertices are currently on the recursion stack to detect back-edges.
A back-edge to an ancestor in the DFS tree indicates a cycle. Ensure you distinguish between visited nodes in the current path and those fully explored in previous branches.
